description: V6 contract for Tool system: definition, execution, toolChoice, multi-step, approval, errors

cases.description: Tool.execute receives parsed INPUT and ToolExecutionOptions; result is in toolResults
dynamicTool accepts any Object? input without schema parsing
toolChoice ToolChoiceNone: model must not return tool calls; throws AiApiCallError if it does
toolChoice ToolChoiceRequired: model must return at least one tool call
toolChoice ToolChoiceSpecific('myTool'): only that tool is exposed and called
Tool results feed into next step until model returns text; up to maxSteps
AiNoSuchToolError is thrown when model calls a tool not in the ToolSet
AiInvalidToolInputError when raw input fails schema fromJson
needsApproval tool returns approval request; execution pauses until response provided
inputExamples on Tool are forwarded to provider in inputExamples field
Tool executor can return Stream; last emitted value becomes tool result
